hero.title: Web & UI/UX Designer, Front-end Integration.
hero.description: Currently UX/UI Consultant at TMS Group, I help our partners craft engaging interfaces that captivate users and move businesses toward their most ambitious goals.

experience.title: For over a decade, I've been building interfaces where human meets technology.

portfolio.title: Selected Works.
portfolio.description: A collection of digital products and brand identities crafted with care, at the intersection of human behavior and technological capability.

recommendations.title: Kind Words.
recommendations.description: What colleagues and partners say about working together.
recommendations.ctaDescription: Your feedback helps me grow and connect with future collaborators — feel free to leave a message.

contact.title: Let's work together.
contact.description: Whether you have a project in mind or just want to talk design over a good
contact.descriptionEnd: (or a coffee), I'm always up for it.
contact.closingText: The best collaborations often start with a simple conversation. Let's meet and see what we could build together.
